segments.text: Lesson 20.

translation.text: 第20课。

segments.text: Pilots.

translation.text: 飞行先驱。

segments.text: Listen to the tape, then answer the question below.

translation.text: 听录音，然后回答下面的问题。

segments.text: What was the name of the first plane to fly across the English Channel?

translation.text: 第一架飞越英吉利海峡的飞机叫什么名字？

segments.text: In 1908, Lord Northcliffe offered a prize of one thousand pounds to the first man who would fly across the English Channel.

translation.text: 1908年，诺思克利夫勋爵悬赏1,000英镑，奖励第一个飞越英吉利海峡的人。

segments.text: Over a year passed before the first attempt was made.

translation.text: 过了一年多，才有人首次尝试。

segments.text: July 19, 1909, in the early morning, Hubert Latham took off from the French coast in his plane, the Antoinette 4.

translation.text: 1909年7月19日清晨，休伯特·莱瑟姆驾驶“安托瓦内特4号”从法国海岸起飞。

segments.text: He had traveled only seven miles across the Channel when his engine failed and he was forced to land on the sea.

translation.text: 他飞过海峡仅7英里，发动机便发生故障，被迫降落海面。

segments.text: The Antoinette floated on the water until Latham was picked up by a ship.

translation.text: “安托瓦内特号”漂浮在水面上，直到莱瑟姆被一艘船救起。

segments.text: Two days later, Louis Bleriot arrived near Calais with a plane called Number 11.

translation.text: 两天后，路易·布莱里奥带着一架名为“11号”的飞机来到加来附近。

segments.text: Bleriot had been making planes since 1905 and this was his latest model.

translation.text: 布莱里奥从1905年起便开始制造飞机，这是他的最新型号。

segments.text: A week before, he had completed a successful overland flight during which he covered 26 miles.

translation.text: 一周前，他刚成功完成一次26英里的陆上飞行。

segments.text: Latham, however, did not give up easily.

translation.text: 然而，莱瑟姆并没有轻易放弃。

segments.text: He, too, arrived near Calais on the same day with a new Antoinette.

translation.text: 同一天，他也带着一架新的“安托瓦内特号”来到加来附近。

segments.text: It looked as if there would be an exciting race across the Channel.

translation.text: 看来一场激动人心的飞越海峡竞赛就要上演。

segments.text: Both planes were going to take off on July 25, but Latham failed to get up early enough.

translation.text: 两架飞机原定7月25日起飞，但莱瑟姆没能足够早地起床。

segments.text: After making a short test flight at 4.15 a.m., Bleriot set off half an hour later.

translation.text: 凌晨4点15分进行一次短暂试飞后，布莱里奥在半小时后启程。

segments.text: His great flight lasted 37 minutes.

translation.text: 他的伟大飞行持续了37分钟。

segments.text: When he landed near Dover, the first person to greet him was a local policeman.

translation.text: 他在多佛附近着陆时，第一个迎接他的是当地一名警察。

segments.text: Latham made another attempt a week later and got within half a mile of Dover, but he was unlucky again.

translation.text: 一周后莱瑟姆再次尝试，飞到距多佛仅半英里处，却又一次运气不佳。

segments.text: His engine failed and he landed on the sea for the second time.

translation.text: 他的发动机发生故障，第二次降落在海面上。
